title: Structures should avoid having too many fields
description: Structures should not have too many fieldsAnalyze your codeadaptability-focusedmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadWhy is this an issue?A structure, such as astruct,unionorclassthat grows too much tends to aggregate too many responsibilities and inevitably becomes harder to understand and therefore to maintain, and having a lot of fields is an indication that a structure has grown too large.Above a specific threshold, it is strongly advised to refactor the structure into smaller ones that focus on well defined topics.When computing the number of fields in a structure, consecutive bit-fields are counted as a single field: Bit-fields are commonly used to map external definitions, and the associated complexity only reflects this external system’s intrinsic complexity.Available In:Catch iss
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Structures should avoid having too many fields
